dialogueChunks.intro: {player_name}, the betrayal goes deeper than we thought. The traitor wasn't acting alone. There's a network of compromised officials.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: {target_npc} found correspondence showing that others have been making side deals with the {enemy_type}. {quest_ally} says the whole thing around the {quest_focus} was rotten from the start: people swearing oaths they never intended to keep. {quest_item} contains the full ledger.
dialogueChunks.outro: Get {quest_item} from {location_hint} before the conspirators destroy it. The betrayed need to see the full picture: not just one traitor, but a pattern.

playerResponses.text: Rot this deep needs to be cut out completely. I'll get the ledger.
Are you sure exposing everything won't make things worse?
This conspiracy is bigger than one person can handle.

dialogueChunks.intro: The traitor knows someone is investigating. They've restricted access and started destroying records.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: {target_npc} tried to access the evidence and was turned away. The traitor is burning documents: {quest_ally} saw smoke from the records room at midnight. If they destroy {quest_item}, the proof of the {quest_threat} goes up in smoke.
dialogueChunks.outro: We have a narrow window to get {quest_item} out before the traitor finishes covering their tracks. There might be another way in {location_hint}.

playerResponses.text: If they're burning evidence, we're running out of time. Show me the way in.
Confronting them directly might force a confession.

dialogueChunks.intro: The person who committed the forgery has been identified. And they've fled to {location_hint}.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: {target_npc} discovered that the forger has been altering documents for years. {quest_ally} found the original document hidden in a wall cavity, but the forger took {quest_item}: a seal that authenticates official records.
dialogueChunks.outro: Without {quest_item}, even the real document can be questioned. Track them down and recover the seal before the {quest_threat} becomes permanent.

playerResponses.text: Someone who betrays a community's trust is the worst kind of thief. I'll find them.
What happens to the forger when I catch them?
They're probably long gone by now.
